name: dentists
extraction_prompt:
Extract the following from this dental practice website. Return JSON only, no other text.

Fields to extract:
- specialties: list of dental specialties (general, cosmetic, orthodontics, implants, pediatric, endodontics, periodontics, oral surgery)
- insurance_accepted: list of insurance plans accepted
- procedures: list of specific procedures offered with price ranges if available
- languages: languages spoken by staff
- emergency: whether they offer emergency/same-day appointments (true/false)
- free_consultation: whether first consultation is free (true/false)
- payment_plans: whether they offer payment plans (true/false)
- technology: notable technology (digital x-rays, 3D imaging, laser, etc.)
- year_established: year practice was established if mentioned
- team_size: number of dentists/hygienists if mentioned

If information is not found, use null for that field.
content_templates: Emergency Dentists in {city}: Who to Call When It Hurts ({year})
{city}'s Most Reviewed Dentists: What Patients Are Saying ({year})
Affordable Dental Implants in {city}: Complete Guide ({year})
Pediatric Dentists in {neighborhood}: A Parent's Guide ({year})
